items.caption_text:
Comment for link

If you’re tired of tan, dark spots, dull skin or tiny bumps, I totally get you 😭💛
I was facing the same… until I tried this facewash!

This Rice Berry Facewash is super gentle but cleans so well 🍚✨
It has Black Rice, Mulberry, Niacinamide, Salicylic Acid & Hyaluronic Acid — all the ingredients that actually help your skin.

🌿 What I noticed:
✔ Tan started reducing
✔ Dark spots looked lighter
✔ Bumps & pores felt cleaner
✔ Skin looked fresh, soft & glowing
✔ No dryness at all 🤌✨

And the best part?
It’s less than ₹299! Works for all skin types and is perfect for both men and women 💁‍♀️💁‍♂️💧

I use it morning & night, and my skin finally feels healthy and clean every day 💕✨

Want the link? Just comment “link 🔗”

#trending #trendingreels #grwm#skincare #makeup
